description: Alice moves the product roadmap meeting from Thursday at 2 PM to Monday at 2 PM, keeping the same time.

events.title: Product Roadmap Meeting
events.reasoning: Alice moves the product roadmap meeting from Thursday to Monday at the same time (2 PM). Matches calendar event [1].
events.assumptions: Duration preserved as 1 hour from the original event. Only the day changes.

mock_llm_response.summary: Moved product roadmap meeting from Thursday to Monday at 2 PM.

notes: Reference datetime is 2026-02-20 (Friday). Thursday = 2026-02-26 (original), Monday = 2026-02-23 (new date). calendar_context[0] so existing_event_id=1.
